title: The Shadow in the Study
openingIncident: At 8:45 pm, Aubrey Finch, retired university professor, was found dead in the victim's home office. Three people had been present during the final minutes, and each gave a different account. Nothing outside the room is needed to identify the killer.

suspects.name: Cassandra Markham
suspects.statement: At 8:35 pm, Elijah Patel helped me move the chair clear of the doorway. We left the room together immediately afterwards. Rowan Blackwood and Aubrey Finch were still inside.
suspects.alibiClaim: Elijah Patel and I were together outside the room from 8:35 pm until the discovery at 8:45 pm.

suspects.name: Elijah Patel
suspects.statement: At 8:35 pm, I helped Cassandra Markham move the chair clear of the doorway. We then left together and remained together until the body was found at 8:45 pm.
suspects.alibiClaim: Cassandra Markham and I were together outside the room from 8:35 pm until the discovery at 8:45 pm.

suspects.name: Rowan Blackwood
suspects.statement: I left at 8:30 pm. I never touched the lamp and did not go near the book.
suspects.alibiClaim: I had already left the room by 8:30 pm and did not return.

clues.title: The Dented Lamp
clues.detail: A fresh blood smear and a new impact dent mark the lamp. Aubrey Finch has a fresh blunt wound to the head.

clues.title: Movement of Chair
clues.detail: A fresh floor scrape made by the chair is crossed by a narrow blood droplet from the attack whose edge remains unbroken. Cassandra Markham and Elijah Patel both state that they moved the chair clear of the doorway at 8:35 pm before leaving together.

clues.title: Fibres on Lamp
clues.detail: Teal-and-cream tweed fibres are caught inside a fresh split beneath the base of the lamp. Rowan Blackwood's teal tweed jacket cuff has a newly frayed cuff edge, exposing the same unusual teal-and-cream check.

clues.title: Fragment at Book
clues.detail: A curved black lacquer chip edged in gold is lodged between the cover and first page of the book on top of a narrow blood droplet from the attack. The black-and-gold fountain-pen cap worn by Rowan Blackwood has a fresh curved gap in the lacquer; the exposed edges visibly fit the fragment.

clues.title: Crack in Mug
clues.detail: A crack runs across the mug. A continuous yellowed glue line is visible deep inside the break.

solution.motive: Rowan Blackwood killed Aubrey Finch because the threat of exposing a decades-old plagiarism scandal that would destroy their own reputation because.
solution.method: Aubrey Finch was killed by a heavy blow from the lamp.
solution.timeOfDeath: After 8:35 pm and before discovery at 8:45 pm
solution.opportunity: Rowan Blackwood claimed to have left at 8:30 pm. The timeline evidence places the attack after Cassandra Markham and Elijah Patel left together at 8:35 pm; the teal-and-cream tweed fibres on the lamp and the black and gold fragment recovered from the book place Rowan Blackwood inside afterwards. Rowan Blackwood therefore had the only evidenced opportunity to be alone with Aubrey Finch and reach the lamp during the murder window.
